name: Chicken in Salsa Verde
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh or 12 ounces Canned tomatillos
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a non-stick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Heat the oil in the skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the chicken pieces and saute until browned on all sides.
4. Add onion and garlic to the skillet, stirring until they become translucent.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (tomatillos, roasted green chilies, apple juice, and cilantro) to the skillet.
6. Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer for about 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
